title: ADK-201: Developer Tooling & adk-web
author: Google Cloud
description: Inspect and debug active agent runs using the adk-web developer console. Review execution traces, memory states, transaction logs, and step playbacks.

features.title: Visual Dashboard
features.description: Spin up local graphical developer web-portals to track real-time agent execution processes.

features.title: Step Auditing
features.description: Audit individual model reasoning cycles, prompt expansions, and tool call outputs.

features.title: Metrics Analysis
features.description: Inspect model token metrics, model execution times, and network network transport latency graphs.
